MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Joanna Pfeister; Pfeister & Associates; 617-429-2355; plaintiff appearing via Zoom on their own behalf.

Paula Nystrom; Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP; 925-222-3400; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Action Property Management.

Defendant contests the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows: plaintiff Joanna Pfeister's Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Rendering Judgment By Default Against Defendant Pursuant To Ccp 2023.030(D)(4) For Disobeying The Court Order To Provide Discovery Under Ccp 2023.010(G) is GRANTED. The order will be stayed and vacated if Defendants (1) produce unredacted copies (as previously order by Judge Schulman; that decision will not be re-visited and reconsidered by this Court) of all communications between the HOA and its attorneys between December 1, 2018 and July 2, 2019, including invoices for legal services, no later than June 14, 2021; and (2) turn over the mailing addresses of all members no later than June 14, 2021, unless they have specifically opted out. Any further proceedings by Defendants in this action are stayed until May 21, 2021. The stay of this order discussed above does not apply to monetary sanctions. No later than May 21, 2021 Defendants to file declarations of compliance and to appear ex-parte with a proposed order vacating the order as outlined above. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
